text: The commissioner is hereby authorized to seek and obtain federal funds to establish, maintain and/or conduct such experimental motor vehicle inspection stations.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 5
##### § 309-B — Federal funds

The commissioner is hereby authorized to seek and obtain federal funds to establish, maintain and/or conduct such experimental motor vehicle inspection stations.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The commissioner is hereby authorized to seek and obtain federal funds to establish, maintain and/or conduct such experimental motor vehicle inspection stations.
